slides.title: Ubuzwe: uMzantsi Afrika, uMbindi Mpuma ne-Afrika
slides.lead: Ukuthelekisa iintshukumo ezine zobuzwe - ubuzwe base-Afrikaner nobuzwe base-Afrika eMzantsi Afrika, kunye ne-Zionism nobuzwe base-Arabhu eMbindi Mpuma - ukuze sibuze ukuba ubuzwe bunako njani ukumanya abantu kwaye kwangaxeshanye buhlule umhlaba.

media.alt: Iiflegi ezine ezenziweyo zisasazeka zisuka kwiglobhu ephakathi, zimela iintshukumo ezine zobuzwe ezithelekiswayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='34' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='34' fill='none' stroke='#4f5d3a' stroke-width='2'/><g stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='3'><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='60' y2='34'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='262' y2='34'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='60' y2='150'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='262' y2='150'/></g><rect x='40' y='22' width='34' height='22' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='246' y='22' width='34' height='22' fill='#1f3a8a'/><rect x='40' y='140' width='34' height='22' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='246' y='140' width='34' height='22' fill='#2f5233'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yakha yonke le yunithi njengophononongo lothelekiso, kungekhona amabali amane ahlukeneyo. Chaza umbuzo ophambili wembali: kutheni ubuzwe - amandla anika abantu isazisi, ikratshi nenkululeko - buvame ukuvelisa ukukhutshelwa ngaphandle kunye nengxabano? Bonisa kwangaphambili isakhiwo: qala uchaze ubuzwe, uze uhlolisise izigmeko ezimbini zoMzantsi Afrika (Afrikaner ne-Afrika), uze uhlolisise izigmeko ezimbini zoMbindi Mpuma (Zionism nobuzwe base-Arabhu), uthelekisa njengoko usiya phambili. Khumbuza abafundi ukuba enye yale mbali iphikiswana kakhulu kwaye isavuselela iimvakalelo namhlanje, ngoko simele sisebenzise imithombo ngokugxeka nangentlonipho.

slides.title: Buyintoni ubuzwe?
slides.lead: Ubuzwe yinkolelo yokuba iqela labantu abanesazisi esifanayo benza 'isizwe' esifanele ukuba nelizwe laso, ukunyaniseka kwaso nokuzimela geqe.

blocks.text: **Isizwe** *luluntu oluzitheliweyo* (imagined community): amalungu aso asoze adibane nabaninzi kubemi abangamawabo, kanti aziva emanyene. **Ubuzwe** buguqula loo mvakalelo bube sisicelo sezopolitiko - ilungelo lokuzilawula kwilizwe elilawo.

Iimbali-mbali zihlula iindidi ezimbini. **Ubuzwe boluntu** (civic nationalism) buchaza isizwe ngobumi obabelwanayo, imithetho namaxabiso, ngoko nabani na angangenela. **Ubuzwe bohlanga** (ethnic nationalism) bubuchaza ngemvelaphi, ulwimi, inkolo okanye inkcubeko efanayo, into enokubakhuphela ngaphandle abangaphandle. Uninzi lweentshukumo zokwenyani luxuba zombini.

items: Budla ngokuxhomekeka kulwimi, inkolo, imbali okanye imvakalelo yemvelaphi eyabelwanayo.
Buvame ukuvuselelwa okanye buqiniswe sisikhalazo esabelwanayo - ukoyiswa, indlala, ucalucalulo okanye ulawulo lwabasemzini.
Bwakha umanyano ngokuchaza 'thina', kodwa ngokwenza oko buchaza no 'bona'.

slides.notes: Nika abafundi isigama sohlalutyo abaza kusisebenzisa kuyo yonke le yunithi: isizwe, ubuzwe, ukuzimela geqe, ubuzwe boluntu ngokuchasene nobuzwe bohlanga, kunye nengcinga ka-Benedict Anderson yoluntu 'oluzitheliweyo'. Gxininisa ukuba ubuzwe abuluhle nje ngokupheleleyo okanye abubi ngokupheleleyo - baqhuba ukukhululwa kwezwe kubukoloniyali kwaye baqhuba nokukhutshelwa ngaphandle nocalucalulo. Isakhono esifundiswayo kukuthelekisa: ingqiqo enye, iimeko ezahlukeneyo.

slides.title: Imibuzo emihlanu oyibuza kubo naboni ubuzwe
slides.lead: Sebenzisa ilensi efanayo kwintshukumo nganye ukuze uzithelekise ngobulungisa.

blocks.heading: Ngubani?
blocks.text: Ngubani obalelwa njengenxalenye yesizwe - kwaye ngubani oshiywa ngaphandle?

blocks.heading: Kutheni ngoku?
blocks.text: Sesiphi isikhalazo okanye ingxaki eyavuselela intshukumo?

blocks.heading: Njani?
blocks.text: Zabahlanganisa njani iinkokeli abantu - inkcubeko, inkolo, imibutho, okanye intshukumo yesininzi?

blocks.heading: Umhlaba?
blocks.text: Nguwuphi ummandla ababewubanga, kwaye ngubani omnye owawubangayo?

blocks.heading: Isiphumo?
blocks.text: Ngaba yazisa inkululeko, ulawulo ngokugagamela, ingxabano - okanye zontathu?

slides.notes: Le yisikhokelo sothelekiso abafundi ekufuneka basisebenzise kubuzwe base-Afrikaner, ubuzwe base-Afrika, i-Zionism kunye nobuzwe base-Arabhu ngokulandelelanayo. Bakhuthaze ukugcina igridi yothelekiso kwiincwadi zabo enale mihlala mihlanu. Bonisa ukuba umbuzo othi 'Umhlaba?' kulapho izigmeko ezimbini zophononongo ziba lusizi khona: kuzo zombini iMzantsi Afrika ne-Israel/Palestina, ubuzwe obubini babubanga umhlaba omnye.

slides.title: Ubuzwe base-Afrikaner: ukoyiswa, indlala novuselelo
slides.lead: Ubuzwe base-Afrikaner bakhula buvela ehlazweni lokoyiswa kwiMfazwe yaseMzantsi Afrika (1899-1902) nendlala ama-Afrikaner amaninzi ajongana nayo emva koko.

blocks.text: Ukoyiswa yiBritani, ukufa kwabafazi nabantwana kwiinkampu zoxinaniso (concentration camps), kunye nokulahleka kweerephabhliki zamaBhulu kwashiya ama-Afrikaner amaninzi eziva ukuba i-volk yawo (abantu) isesichengeni. Kumashumi eminyaka alandelayo amashumi amawaka aba 'ngabamhlophe abahlwempuzekileyo', betyhalelwa ngaphandle emhlabeni baya ezixekweni.

Iinkokeli zasebenzisa **ulwimi, inkolo nembali** ukwakha kwakhona ikratshi. Isi-Afrikaans senziwa saba semgangathweni saza saxhaswa; iCawe yamaDatshi eGuqulweyo (Dutch Reformed Church) yagxininisa ama-Afrikaner njengabantu abanyuliweyo; kwaye ibali leTreki eNkulu (Great Trek) laba yintsomi yesiseko yabantu abalwela inkululeko.

items: I-**Afrikaner Broederbond** (eyasekwa ngo-1918) yakha uthungelwano oluyimfihlo lokuqhubela phambili izilangano zama-Afrikaner kwezopolitiko, kwishishini nakwinkcubeko.
Amaqumrhu enkcubeko kunye neminyaka elikhulu (1938) yeTreki eNkulu kwaphehla iimvakalelo zesininzi.
I-**National Party** yaqondisa esi sazisi ekufuneni amandla karhulumente.

media.alt: Isithunzi senqwelo yeenkabi ngezantsi kwelanga eliphumayo, esikhumbuza iTreki eNkulu eyasetyenziswa njengophawu lobuzwe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='170' cy='58' r='26' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#5a4a2a'><rect x='60' y='92' width='70' height='24'/><path d='M60 92 l14 -16 h44 l12 16 Z'/></g><circle cx='74' cy='120' r='12' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='4'/><circle cx='120' cy='120' r='12' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='130' y1='104' x2='168' y2='100' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza indlela imvakalelo yokuxhwalekiswa eyaguqulwa ngayo yaba yinkqubo yezopolitiko. Indlela ephambili: isikhalazo (ukoyiswa, indlala yabamhlophe abahlwempuzekileyo) kudibene nokuhlanganiswa kwenkcubeko (ulwimi, icawe, intsomi yembali, i-Broederbond) kulingana nentshukumo yesininzi. Iminyaka elikhulu yeTreki eNkulu yowe-1938 ngumzekelo omhle wesithethe esenziweyo. [SME] Yiphathe inkumbulo yeenkampu zoxinaniso ngononophelo nangokuchanekileyo; yeyokwenyani ngokwembali kwaye yasetyenziswa kamva ngokwezopolitiko. Phawula ukuba obu bubuzwe bohlanga obuchazwa ngemvelaphi, ulwimi nenkolo.

slides.title: 1948: Ubuzwe base-Afrikaner buthimba urhulumente
slides.lead: Ngo-1948 i-National Party yaphumelela amandla yaza yaguqula ubuzwe base-Afrikaner baba ngumgaqo-nkqubo osemthethweni wocalucalulo (apartheid).

blocks.text: Ikhokelwa ngu-**D.F. Malan**, i-National Party yaphumelela unyulo lwabamhlophe kuphela lowe-1948 ngesithembiso se-*apartheid* ('ukwahlulwa'). Ubuzwe base-Afrikaner ngoku babulawula urhulumente kwaye babusebenzisa ukukhusela imisebenzi, ulwimi namandla ama-Afrikaner - nokunyanzelisa ulawulo lwabamhlophe phezu kwesininzi esimnyama.

items: Urhulumente wandisa imfundo yesi-Afrikaans, inkonzo karhulumente kunye namashishini karhulumente ukuze aphucule ama-Afrikaner.
Imithetho yocalucalulo yahlula abantu ngokohlanga yaza yagcinela amandla namalungelo abamhlophe.
Esi sisigmeko sobuzwe obazuza ukuzimela geqe kwiqela elinye ngokubuvimba kwabanye.

media.alt: Ibha egrafu enyukayo phambi kwesakhiwo sikarhulumente, ibonisa iqela elinye lifumana amandla ngasekonakaleni kwabanye.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='36' width='120' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M54 36 q36 -22 72 0 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='42' y='48' width='8' height='28' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='130' y='48' width='8' height='28' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#2f5233'><rect x='160' y='108' width='16' height='28'/><rect x='182' y='88' width='16' height='48'/><rect x='204' y='60' width='16' height='76'/></g><rect x='28' y='136' width='196' height='6' fill='#5a4a2a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza inqaku lohlalutyo licace: ubuzwe base-Afrikaner 'baphumelela' ngo-1948, kodwa impumelelo yabo yayiyingcinezelo yabanye abantu. Oku kumisela ungquzulwano oluthe ngqo nobuzwe base-Afrika. Nxulumanisa nesikhokelo: Ngubani owayefakiwe? (Ama-Afrikaner, emva koko abamhlophe.) Ngubani owayekhutshelwe ngaphandle? (Isininzi esimnyama.) Phawula ukuba i-apartheid yayiyinkqubo yokudala imisebenzi nokuphucula ama-Afrikaner ahlwempuzekileyo, into enceda ukucacisa ukuthandwa kwayo eluntwini lwayo.

slides.title: Ubuzwe base-Afrika: umanyano ngokuchasene nokukhutshelwa ngaphandle
slides.lead: Ubuzwe base-Afrika bakhula njengempendulo koloyiso, ukulahleka komhlaba nokukhutshelwa ngaphandle kwiManyano yoMzantsi Afrika eyasekwa ngo-1910.

blocks.text: IManyano yoMzantsi Afrika (1910) yamanya abamhlophe kodwa yavalela abantu abaNtsundu ngaphandle kwamandla ezopolitiko. Ngo-1912 iinkokeli ezifundileyo zase-Afrika zaseka **iSouth African Native National Congress** - eyathiywa kwakhona igama layo yaba yi-**African National Congress (ANC)** ngo-1923 - ukuze imanye abantu abaNtsundu kuwo onke amahlanga nemimandla kwaye ifune amalungelo esizweni esinye esixhaphakileyo.

**Umthetho woMhlaba wabaNtsundu wowe-1913** (1913 Natives Land Act), owawugcinela abamhlophe uninzi lomhlaba welizwe, wabonisa isizathu sokuba umanyano lwaba ngxamiseko. Ubuzwe base-Afrika bokuqala babuthozamile: babusebenzisa izicelo, iidelegeyithi nomthetho ukucela ukubandakanywa.

items: Bujolise ekwoyiseni ukwahlulwa ngokohlanga nasekwakheni isizwe esinye sase-Afrika, kamva esaba yisizwe soMzantsi Afrika esingakhethi buhlanga.
Buchaza isizwe ngobumi obabelwanayo namalungelo - umbono ongowoluntu ngakumbi.
Iindlela zabo zokuqala zazingokomgaqo-siseko; ukungoneliseki kwaba kuqhubela phambili baya kwintshukumo yesininzi kamva.

media.alt: Imifanekiso emincinci emininzi eyimilo eyahlukeneyo ibambana izandla yenza isangqa esinye, isimela umanyano phakathi kwamaqela.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='120' cy='40' r='11'/><circle cx='176' cy='62' r='11'/><circle cx='176' cy='108' r='11'/><circle cx='120' cy='130' r='11'/><circle cx='64' cy='108' r='11'/><circle cx='64' cy='62' r='11'/></g><circle cx='120' cy='85' r='52' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' stroke-dasharray='6 6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Thelekisa ingqiqo yesiseko nobuzwe base-Afrikaner: ubuzwe base-Afrika bajolisa ekwakheni umanyano phakathi kwamahlanga amaninzi ase-Afrika (amaZulu, amaXhosa, abeSuthu nabanye) ngenjongo yokuchasa urhulumente owawubavalela ngaphandle. Gxininisa umbono ongowoluntu, obandakanya wonke umntu - i-ANC ekugqibeleni yaya ekungakhethini buhlanga. Phawula i-ironi le yunithi ebuyela kuyo rhoqo: ubuzwe obubini boMzantsi Afrika, obunye bufuna ulawulo, obunye bufuna ukubandakanywa, buhlangana emhlabeni omnye.

slides.title: Isizukulwana esitsha: iANC Youth League
slides.lead: Ngeminyaka yee-1940 isizukulwana esitsha safuna ubuzwe base-Afrika obunobukroti nobusekelwe kwisininzi.

blocks.text: Bekhathazekile ngamashumi eminyaka ezicelo ezithozamileyo, iinkokeli eziselula zaseka i-**ANC Youth League** ngo-1944. Umongameli wayo wokuqala, u-**Anton Lembede**, wathi abantu base-Afrika kufuneka bazikhulule ngekratshi, ukuzimela nokuhlanganisa isininzi endaweni yokulinda inceba yabamhlophe.
Africa is a black man's country... Africans are one. Out of the heterogeneous tribes there must emerge a homogeneous nation.
blocks.cite: Anton Lembede, 'Some Basic Principles of African Nationalism', 1945

items: INkqubo yeSenzo (Programme of Action) yeYouth League ka-1949 yamkela imibhikisho, ukungathengi kunye nokungathobeli komthetho ngenjongo.
Amagqala anjengoNelson Mandela, uWalter Sisulu no-Oliver Tambo enyuka esithi ngale mibutho.
Obu buzwe base-Afrika obunobukroti buya kuqhuba umzabalazo wesininzi ochasene nocalucalulo ngeminyaka yee-1950.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa isicatshulwa sikaLembede ukubonisa umxholo weemvakalelo wobuzwe base-Afrika - ukuzimela nomanyano phakathi kwamahlanga - ngeliphawula ukuba isithethe esiphambili se-ANC saya nakwikungakhethini buhlanga (kamva iFreedom Charter). [SME] Ubu-Afrikanism bukaLembede yayibubunye kuphela; i-ANC yayinengxoxo phakathi kobu-Afrikanism obuvalelayo nokungakhethi buhlanga okubandakanyayo, into eyaphumela ekuzahluleni kwe-PAC (1959). Gcina inuance: ubuzwe base-Afrika babungabunye kuphela. Nxulumanisa nangaphambili: esi sizukulwana sikhokela iDefiance Campaign eyafundwa kwiBanga 9.

slides.title: Ubuzwe obubini, ilizwe elinye
slides.lead: Ubuzwe base-Afrikaner nobase-Afrika bakhula ngakwelinye icala, ngasinye sibumba esinye.

items: Busekelwe ekoyisweni yiBritani nendlala yabamhlophe abahlwempuzekileyo.
Bohlanga: buchazwa ngemvelaphi, isi-Afrikaans necawe.
Injongo: ukuzilawula nokukhusela i-volk yase-Afrikaner.
Baphumelela urhulumente ngo-1948 baza bakha i-apartheid.
Bazuza inkululeko yabo ngokulawula abanye ngokugagamela.
Busekelwe koloyiso, ukulahleka komhlaba nokukhutshelwa ngaphandle.
Injongo yoluntu: ukumanya amaqela amaninzi abe sisizwe esinye.
Injongo: amalungelo alinganayo nokuzilawula kwesininzi.
Baguquka baba ngumzabalazo wesininzi ukususela ngee-1940-50.
Bafuna inkululeko ngokubandakanya, kungekhona ngokulawula ngokugagamela.

slides.notes: Nqumama apha ukuze wenze uqheliselo lothelekiso oluqulunqiweyo. Cela abafundi bakhankanye ukufana (bobabini basebenzisa imbali, inkcubeko nemibutho ukuhlanganisa; bobabini babefuna ukuzimela geqe) nokwahluka (obunye buvalelayo bulawula, obunye bubandakanyayo bakhutshelwa ngaphandle). Gxininisa unxibelelwano: ingcinezelo yobuzwe base-Afrikaner yaqinisa ubuzwe base-Afrika, kwaye uchaso lwase-Afrika lwaqinisa ubuzwe base-Afrikaner. Olu bumbo lwenyani yeyona ngqiqo iphakamileyo ebalulekileyo kwi-FET.

slides.title: I-Zionism: ikhaya labantu bamaJuda
slides.lead: I-Zionism yayiyintshukumo yobuzwe eyayifuna ikhaya lamaJuda, ubukhulu becala njengempendulo kwiminyaka eliwaka yentshutshiso eYurophu.

blocks.text: Bejongene nobundlobongela bokucaphukela amaJuda - imibulalo (pogroms) kuBukhosi baseRashiya kunye neDreyfus Affair eFransi - u-**Theodor Herzl** waxoxa kwincwadi ethi *The Jewish State* (1896) ukuba amaJuda ayeya kukhuseleka kuphela xa enelizwe lawo. INgqungquthela yokuqala yamaZionist yahlangana eBasel ngo-1897, kwaye ukufuduka kwamaJuda ukuya ePalestina kwanda.

Kwi-**Balfour Declaration (1917)** iBritani yavakalisa inkxaso 'yekhaya lesizwe labantu bamaJuda' ePalestina - ilizwe elalihlala labantu abangama-Arabhu ngokugqithisileyo ngelo xesha. IBritani yalawula iPalestina phantsi kwegunya leLeague of Nations emva kowe-1920, kwaye izikhwikhwiniso phakathi koluntu lwamaJuda nolwama-Arabhu zanda.

items: I-Zionism yaxuba isazisi sohlanga nesenkolo nesicelo sanamhlanje sokuzimela.
Yaqhutywa yintshutshiso eyayiyeyokwenyani neyayibulala, ngaphezu kwako konke uHlaselo lwamaJuda (Holocaust) lowe-1941-1945.
Kodwa umhlaba eyayiwubanga sele ubulikhaya labantu abangama-Arabhu ababenemvakalelo yabo yobuzwe.

media.alt: Inkwenkwezi enamasondo amathandathu ngaphezu komda owenziweyo, imela isicelo samaZionist sekhaya lamaJuda.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='none' stroke='#1f3a8a' stroke-width='6' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M120 34 L146 94 L86 58 L154 58 L94 94 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Bonisa i-Zionism njengempendulo kwintshutshiso yokwenyani, ebulalayo, egqibela ngoHlaselo lwamaJuda (Holocaust) - abafundi kufuneka baqonde isizathu sokuba amaJuda amaninzi agqiba ekubeni afuna ilizwe lawo. Kwangaxeshanye, cacisa ngokwenyani ukuba iPalestina yayisele ihlala abantu, ubukhulu becala ama-Arabhu, ngoko umhlaba omnye wawuthwele izibango ezimbini. [SME] Le yimbali ephikiswana kakhulu neqhwabelayo; hlala kwizibakala ezivunyelwene ngokubanzi (Herzl, Basel 1897, Balfour 1917, uLawulo lweBritani) uphephe ukuthatha amacala. Yenza umzekelo wokugxeka umthombo: i-Balfour Declaration yathembisa nokungabuchaphazeli ubulungisa 'boluntu olukhoyo olungengelo lamaJuda'.

slides.title: 1948: inkululeko nentlekele
slides.lead: Isiganeko esinye sowe-1948 sikhunjulwa ngeendlela ezichaseneyo zizizwe ezibini.

blocks.text: Emva koHlaselo lwamaJuda (Holocaust) nengxabano ekhulayo, iZizwe eziManyeneyo zavota ngo-1947 ukwahlula iPalestina ibe lilizwe lamaJuda nelizwe lama-Arabhu. **Nge-14 Meyi 1948** iinkokeli zamaJuda zavakalisa **iLizwe lakwa-Israel**. Imfazwe nawomelene amazwe angama-Arabhu yalandela ngoko nangoko.

AmaIsrayeli akhumbula u-1948 njenge-**Mfazwe yawo yeNkululeko** - impumelelo yekhaya elikhuselekileyo. AmaPalestina awakhumbula njenge-**Nakba** ('intlekele'): kuqikelelwa ukuba abantu abangama-Arabhu abangama-700 000 basaba okanye bagxothwa kwaye abavunyelwanga ukubuya. Umhlaba omnye, izizwe ezibini, iinkumbulo ezimbini ezingahambelaniyo.

items: Kwesinye isizwe, u-1948 wawuthetha ukuzimela geqe nokusinda.
Kwesinye, wawuthetha ukuhluthwa umhlaba nokugxothelwa kwilizwe.
Olu ngquzulwano olungakhange luccombuluke lusabumba uMbindi Mpuma nanamhlanje.

media.alt: Ummandla omnye owahlulwe ngumgca othe nkqo, elinye icala linyuka elinye lihamba, kubonisa iinkumbulo ezimbini ezichaseneyo zowe-1948.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='16' y='30' width='96' height='100' fill='#a8bcae'/><rect x='128' y='30' width='96' height='100' fill='#d8c6a8'/><rect x='116' y='24' width='8' height='112' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#1f3a8a'><path d='M64 60 L74 84 L54 70 L86 70 L66 84 Z'/></g><g fill='#5a4a2a'><circle cx='160' cy='72' r='7'/><rect x='153' y='80' width='14' height='24'/><path d='M172 88 h22 l-8 -8 v16 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Le yeyona slayidi inovakalelo kwesi sethi; yifundise njengesifundo ngembono nangenkumbulo yembali. Bonisa amagama omabini owe-1948 ecaleni komnye ngaphandle kokuwabeka ngokulandelelana, usebenzise ulwimi oluthi 'kukhunjulwa njenge'. [SME] Amanani nezizathu zokusaba kwamaPalestina aphikiswana ngokwenene ziimbali-mbali (ukusaba ngokwenza vs ukugxothwa); bonisa inani elingama-700 000 njengoqikelelo uze uphawule ingxoxo. Injongo yokufundisa yimfobe nokugxeka umthombo: isiganeko esinye ngomhla ofanayo sivelisa amabali amabini obuzwe. Mema ingxoxo ezolileyo, enentlonipho uze ubeke imigaqo kuqala.

slides.title: Ubuzwe base-Arabhu: umanyano nenkululeko
slides.lead: Ubuzwe base-Arabhu bafuna ukukhulula abantu abathetha isi-Arabhu kulawulo lwabasemzini kwaye, kwabanye, ukubamanya babe sisizwe esinye.

blocks.text: Njengoko uBukhosi bama-Ottoman badiliza emva keMfazwe yeHlabathi yokuQala, imihlaba yama-Arabhu yahlulwa yaba ngamagunya aseBritani nawaseFransi. Abazwe base-Arabhu babengalufuni olu lawulo lwabasemzini nemida eyakhelwa ngamaYurophu, kwaye baya besichasa ngokungakumbi ukuhlaliswa kwamaZionist ePalestina.

Le ntshukumo yafikelela encotsheni phantsi kuka-**Gamal Abdel Nasser** waseYiputa. Xa uNasser **enza umjelo waseSuez (Suez Canal) waba ngoolawulwa ngumbuso ngo-1956** waza wajongana nohlaselo lweBritani, iFransi ne-Israel, waba liqhawe kulo lonke ihlabathi lama-Arabhu nophawu lweentshukumo ezichasene nobukoloniyali kuyo yonke iAfrika neAsia.

items: Bwakhelwe phezu kolwimi lwesi-Arabhu, inkcubeko kunye (kwabaninzi) inkolo yamaSilamsi.
**I-Pan-Arabism** yayiphupha ukumanya onke ama-Arabhu, imanya iYiputa neSyria okwexeshana ngo-1958.
Yayichasene ngokuqinileyo nobukoloniyali kwaye yakhuthaza imizabalazo yenkululeko yaseAfrika.

media.alt: Iketanga eqhawukileyo ngaphezu komjelo owenziweyo, imela ubuzwe base-Arabhu obuchasene nobukoloniyali kunye neNgxaki yaseSuez.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='104' y='30' width='32' height='108' fill='#4f7fae'/><g fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='7'><circle cx='72' cy='58' r='14'/><circle cx='96' cy='72' r='14'/></g><g fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='7'><circle cx='168' cy='58' r='14'/><circle cx='144' cy='72' r='14'/></g><line x1='108' y1='66' x2='132' y2='66' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-dasharray='4 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bonisa ubuzwe base-Arabhu njengenye intshukumo echasene nobukoloniyali, into enxulumanisa isigmeko soMbindi Mpuma nase-Afrika (isihloko seCAPS sixhaphaka kuwo omabini). UNasser neSuez 1956 yeyona ngongoma: igunya elincinci elichasa iinkosi zeekoloni zangaphambili lachukumisa ihlabathi elalikhutshwa ebukoloniyalini, kuquka iAfrika esezantsi kweSahara. Phawula uxinzelelo ngaphakathi kobuzwe base-Arabhu phakathi komanyano lwe-pan-Arab namazwe ahlukeneyo, nokuba uchaso ne-Zionism yayisisizathu esimanyayo. Nxulumanisa amandla achasene nobukoloniyali nobuzwe base-Afrika obufundwe ngaphambili.

slides.title: Ubuzwe obubini, umhlaba omnye
slides.lead: NjengoMzantsi Afrika, uMbindi Mpuma wabona ubuzwe obubini bubanga umhlaba omnye.

items: Impendulo kucaphukelo lwamaJuda eYurophu naseHlaselweni lwamaJuda (Holocaust).
Yohlanga-nkolo: ikhaya labantu bamaJuda.
Injongo: ilizwe lamaJuda elikhuselekileyo ePalestina.
Yazuza ubuzwe ngo-1948 (Israel).
Impumelelo yayo yagxothela ngaphandle abemi abangama-Arabhu basePalestina.
Impendulo ekudilikeni kobukhosi bama-Ottoman nakulawulo lobukoloniyali lwamaYurophu.
Busekelwe kulwimi lwesi-Arabhu nenkcubeko eyabelwanayo.
Injongo: inkululeko kunye (kwabanye) umanyano lwama-Arabhu.
Bafikelela encotsheni ngoNasser neNgxaki yaseSuez yowe-1956.
Bachasene ne-Zionism kwaye bakhuthaza iAfrika echasene nobukoloniyali.

slides.notes: Qhuba uqheliselo lothelekiso olufanayo nolwesalayidi soMzantsi Afrika. Emva koko yenza unxulumaniso oluphakathi kwezigmeko lucace: kuzo zombini uMzantsi Afrika nePalestina kubonakala ubuzwe obubini bungquzulana ngommandla omnye, buvelisa ingxabano ende, ebuhlungu. Cela abafundi bathelekise kungekhona nje i-Zionism vs ubuzwe base-Arabhu, kodwa nobuzwe base-Afrikaner vs i-Zionism (bobabini bubuncinci bufuna ukhuseleko nokulawula) kunye nobuzwe base-Afrika vs ubuzwe base-Arabhu (zombini iintshukumo zesininzi ezichasene nobukoloniyali). Olu thelekiso lweempande zone yiyona ngcinga iphakamileyo ehlawulwa yiCAPS.

slides.title: Ubuzwe: amandla amanyayo nahlulayo
slides.lead: Kuzo zonke izigmeko ezine, ubuzwe banika abantu isazisi nenkululeko - kwaye bazoba imida eyakhokelela engxabanweni.

blocks.alt: Ixesha-lokulandelelana leempawu ezibalulekileyo zobuzwe ukususela ngo-1897 ukuya ku-1958 kuMzantsi Afrika naseMbindi Mpuma.

events.label: I-ANC Youth League yaqinisa ubuzwe base-Afrika
I-National Party iphumelela amandla; iLizwe lakwa-Israel livakaliswa / iNakba
UNasser neNgxaki yaseSuez: incopho yobuzwe base-Arabhu

slides.notes: Hlanganisa ngeli xesha-lokulandelelana labelwanayo ukuze abafundi babone iintshukumo ezine ziqhambuka kwixesha elinye, zichaphazelana (ukuchasa ubukoloniyali kwasasaza iingcamango ngaphaya kwemida). Zoba ingxoxo yesigqibo: ubuzwe ngamandla anamacala amabini - baqhuba ukukhululwa kubukoloniyali nocalucalulo, kanti apho izizwe ezibini zazibanga umhlaba omnye avelisa ukuhluthwa umhlaba nengxabano yesigxina. Phawula u-1948 njengonyaka ohambelanayo omangalisayo ovela kwizigmeko ezimbini ezahlukeneyo ngaxeshanye.

slides.title: Uphengululo: ukuthelekisa ubuzwe
slides.lead: Sebenzisa isikhokelo semibuzo emihlanu kunye nothelekiso ukuphendula imibuzo engezantsi.

blocks.text: Kwesi sifundo sichaze ubuzwe, sahlula **ubuzwe boluntu** (civic) kubuzwe **bohlanga** (ethnic), saza sathelekisa iintshukumo ezine: ubuzwe base-**Afrikaner** nobase-**Afrika** eMzantsi Afrika, kunye ne-**Zionism** nobuzwe base-**Arabhu** eMbindi Mpuma. Kuyo yomibini le mimandla ubuzwe obubini babanga umhlaba omnye, kunemiphumo ekude.

blocks.question: Chaza umahluko phakathi kobuzwe boluntu nobuzwe bohlanga, usebenzisa umzekelo OMNYE waseMzantsi Afrika nomzekelo OMNYE waseMbindi Mpuma.
Thelekisa iimvelaphi zobuzwe base-Afrikaner nobuzwe base-Afrika. Bhekisa kokungenani kokubini ukufana nokubini ukwahluka.

'Iziganeko zika-1948 zazithetha inkululeko kwisizwe esinye nelahleko kwesinye.' Usebenzisa umzekelo waseMzantsi Afrika OKANYE lowamaIsrayeli namaPalestina, xoxa indlela isiganeko esinye sembali esinokukhunjulwa ngayo ngeendlela ezichaseneyo.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa le mibuzo mithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliweyo okanye ingxoxo-mpikiswano yeklasi equlunqiweyo; ukwabiwa kwamanqaku kulinganisa iindlela zeCAPS zokubhala okwandisiweyo nezisekelwe kumthombo. Umbuzo wesi-3 uvavanya ngokucacileyo isakhono sokuqonda inkumbulo ephikiswanayo nembono, esisisiseko kwesi sihloko. Khumbuza abafundi ukuba baxoxe ngobungqina baze bamele icala ngalinye ngobulungisa. [SME] Ngaphambi kokuvavanya iindaba zase-Israel/Palestina, qinisekisa ukuba isikhokelo sesebe sokufundisa esi sihloko siphikiswanayo silandelwe kwaye kubonelelwe ngeentlobo ngeentlobo zemithombo.
